repomix.description: ✅ Code packaging and analysis - 7 tools for analyzing codebases

context7.description: ✅ Documentation search - 2 tools for finding library docs

zen.description: ✅ AI workflows - 18 tools + 19 prompts for development (code review, debugging, analysis, etc.)
zen.note: Requires OPENAI_API_KEY in environment - module inherits it automatically

deepwiki.description: ✅ GitHub repository documentation - 3 tools for exploring repo docs (uses Streamable HTTP transport)

filesystem.description: ✅ Official MCP filesystem server - safe file operations within specified directory
filesystem.note: ⚠️  Change /tmp to your desired safe directory path before using!

wikidata.description: ❌ EXPERIMENTAL: Wikidata query server - 7 tools for semantic search and SPARQL queries
wikidata.note: ⚠️  Server returns 400 Bad Request - may require authentication or specific headers

browser-use.description: ⚠️  Browser automation - 11 tools for web scraping
browser-use.note: ⚠️  Works but logs to stdout causing parse warnings (cosmetic issue, still functional)

_comment: The main mcpServers section contains verified working servers. Move servers from _experimental_servers when you want to try them (they have known issues).
